form.formComment: Fast starter. Last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on March 28 over 300m at this track behind Patient Vicky beaten 13 lengths (18.29). Looks a strong winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fast starter. Last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on March 28 over 300m at this track behind Patient Vicky beaten 13 lengths (18.29). Looks a strong winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Strong performance to score by 4 lengths in a Mix 1/2/3 last start at this track, clocking a hot 17.29 for the 300m trip. Expected to push the clock again here.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Finished third last start (23.28) at big odds over 400m at The Gardens. Has a low draw. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (17.74) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Has one win and six placings from 12 starts from the draw. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Has finished last in his last couple of starts, most recently at Richmond over 401m. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (17.79) over 300m at this track. Must be included.

formComments.comment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (17.79) over 300m at this track. Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked out across heels and lost ground rounding the first turn.
Shifted in at the start, bumped the hindquarters and became unbalanced.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a slick early split and went straight to the front, giving a huge sight but headed late when a 2.25 lengths second (17.79) over 300m at this track. Top-three hope with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a slick early split and went straight to the front, giving a huge sight but headed late when a 2.25 lengths second (17.79) over 300m at this track. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 6 length third (17.69) over 300m at this track and making it two placings on end. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 4 on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Tralee Aimee beaten 3.5 lengths (17.93). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.
